q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares VIP to New customers (two observed groups) but never compares the observed value to an expected/baseline/typical/assumed value.
q_aware_rationale: The numerical values (43,288.75 vs 6,174.40, 306 vs 1,283 orders, 13.2M vs 7.9M revenue) are correctly summarized and a clear 'supported' verdict is given.
